content:
<li>❌ If peer engagement is required, the assignment must be submitted on time.</li>
</ul>
<hr />
<h3>📌 8. Student Response Requirement & Weekly Journal</h3>
<p>To confirm you have read and understood these policies, you will complete a brief response test. The test will consist of fill-in-the-blank and short-answer questions.</p>
<p>📍 <strong>Submit your response here:</strong> <a href="#">Acknowledgment & Reflection Submission</a></p>
<hr />
<h3>📌 9. Summary of Key Updates (Effective Next Class)</h3>
<p>If you have questions, concerns, or need accommodations, respond with your phone number & availability for a call.</p>
<p>Looking forward to working with you.</p>
<p><strong>Best,<br /></strong><strong>Professor Anthony Padavano</strong></p>
